use_codes.desc: REDUCTION OF THROMBOTIC CARDIOVASCULAR EVENTS IN PATIENTS WITH A HISTORY OF MYOCARDIAL INFARCTION (MI) OR WITH PERIPHERAL ARTERIAL DISEASE (PAD)

indications.text:
1.1 Patients with History of Myocardial Infarction (MI) or with Peripheral Arterial Disease (PAD)
ZONTIVITY® is indicated for the reduction of thrombotic cardiovascular events in patients with a
history of myocardial infarction (MI) or with peripheral arterial disease (PAD). ZONTIVITY has been
shown...
